0:
The disciplined domestic seeks assistance in acquiring the materials necessary for Nanapasi's masterwork.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

The disciplined domestic seeks assistance in acquiring the materials necessary for Nanapasi's masterwork.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
As the disciplined domestic tells it, the map entrusted to you by Nanapasi will lead you to a buried stash of the age-old doll parts he requires to assemble the decorations he has promised his daughter.

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Decipher<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> the Thorne Dynasty map to reveal the location of the parts, then acquire them and deliver them to the disciplined domestic.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

As the disciplined domestic tells it, the map entrusted to you by Nanapasi will lead you to a buried stash of the age-old doll parts he requires to assemble the decorations he has promised his daughter.

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Decipher<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> the Thorne Dynasty map to reveal the location of the parts, then acquire them and deliver them to the disciplined domestic.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

50:
While tales of the dolls' beauty are many, actual descriptive records of the materials used and the means by which they were made are not so easily had. To further complicate things, the Thorne dolls were destroyed back when the Ul Dynasty came to power.
While this was doubtless done in order to sever cultural ties to the past and reinforce the Ul Dynasty's rule, it does not make our job any easier.
